description: Stylish to the T, this  tote with multi-coloured design makes for a perfect wear for the woman of style. Easy to use, spacious and comfortable to carry, this is a must-have in any woman's wardrobe.Height: 15.7"Width: 14.2"Depth: 5"Capacity: 22 litresMade of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and slidersWide synthetic fabric handles with reinforced stitches for easy carryingOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and two open pockets for easy organizingOne small zippered pouch hanging from a loop outside to hold a mobile or small changeCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
